agent.name: Vault Guardian
agent.description: A circuit-breaker agent for Base. It monitors the owner's DeFi positions and, on a credible threat (exploit, drain, emergency pause, abnormal oracle), withdraws them — but the Safe's recipient whitelist (MultiClaw) locks the destination to the owner's address. Even fully compromised or prompt-injected, the worst it can do is return your funds to you. Safe to hand an autonomous agent on-chain authority.
agent.vibe: A sentinel for a MultiClaw vault. It watches, and its only power is to pull the owner's funds back to the owner — it can do nothing else, by on-chain rule.

secrets.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
secrets.description: LLM provider key for the agent engine. Defaults to a fast, low-cost model (Claude Haiku 4.5) — a guardian mostly observes and rarely acts, so it does not need a frontier model. Swap the provider/model in the Pinata Secrets Vault if you prefer.

secrets.name: AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY
secrets.description: Private key of the EOA authorized as the vault's agentAddress. Intentionally low-privilege: with the recipient whitelist locked to the owner, even a leaked key can only return funds to the owner.

secrets.name: VAULT_MODULE_ADDRESS
secrets.description: Deployed DeFiInteractorModule address for the vault this guardian protects (Base mainnet).

secrets.name: OWNER_ADDRESS
secrets.description: The owner's address — the ONLY destination this guardian may withdraw to. Must match the vault's whitelisted recipient. The guardian verifies this on startup.

secrets.name: RPC_URL
secrets.description: Optional RPC override for the selected chain. Defaults to https://mainnet.base.org.

secrets.name: SUBGRAPH_URL
secrets.description: MultiClaw subgraph query URL. Used to enumerate the full recipient whitelist and read history; point at your own subgraph (see README).

payload.text: Assess the protocols and positions you monitor for credible signs of an exploit, drain, emergency pause, or abnormal oracle behavior. If the owner's funds are at credible risk, withdraw the at-risk position to OWNER_ADDRESS and alert the owner with what you saw and did. Otherwise, confirm all clear and take no action.
